title: Lifecycle Fix - v1.0.7
summary: Fresh installable 1.0.7 build so Android testers stranded on the old 1.0.5 preview finally get the fix: arrival confirmation, visit completion, scheduled-visit continuity, and emergency pricing now flow end-to-end. Runtime moved 1.0.6 -> 1.0.7; install this build to receive future over-the-air updates.

changes.message: Confirm arrival and complete visits reliably - the full emergency lifecycle now syncs from dispatch through completion and rating.
Scheduled visits gained a live lifecycle card, cancel confirmation, and recovery notice on the map visit detail.
Emergency pricing never blocks intake - a server-owned fallback quote applies when an exact service tier is missing.
New installable build (runtime 1.0.7) so testers off the frozen 1.0.5 preview APK get the fix and future OTAs. Check Settings for the muted build marker.
